oversightFindingsTriage.title: Phase C versus Phase E dependency coherence requires explicit decision record
oversightFindingsTriage.rationale: Codebase review confirms exact DrawingRevision provenance is NOT guaranteed for knowledge/commercial template chain. Growth payloads (knowledgeTemplateReviewGrowthService, knowledgeTemplatePublicationGrowthService) carry templateRevisionId (Knowledge Library template version) not drawing revision IDs. linkedRevisionIds is optional call-time context for viewer chrome subscription only â€” not persisted in Memory audit payloads for template review/publication. LessonsLearnedCapture type has no sourceRevisionIds field. drawing_revision_superseded events exist (revisionDetectionService) but no knowledge invalidation/revalidation hook. Cross-ref timeline tracks revisionId but is not linked to knowledge template chain. VariationEvidenceLink supports entityType drawing_revision but knowledge pipeline does not consume it. Superseded drawing invalidation and approved-knowledge revalidation on source revision change are not implemented.
